nasb.text: For He has said somewhere concerning the seventh day: “And God rested on the seventh day from all His works”;

esv.text: For he has somewhere spoken of the seventh day in this way: “And God rested on the seventh day from all his works.”

cnv.text: 因為論到第七日，他在聖經某一處說：“在第七日　神歇了他的一切工作。”

ccb.text: 因为圣经论到第七日时说：“第七日，上帝歇了一切的工。”

csbs.text: 原来关于第七日，他在经上某处这样说： “神在第七日， 歇了他所有的工作。”
